paged.searchPlaceholder: Search by document, zone, or assignee...
paged.advancedDescription: Apply rules, reset the list, and restart loading from the top.

panel.appearanceDescription: Switch between light and dark appearance.

validation.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in the required fields.
validation.newPasswordMinLength: The new password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.newPasswordMaxLength: The new password can be at most 100 characters.

auth.title: Run warehouse operations from one mobile center
auth.subtitle: Secure access to the WMS control panel
auth.loginDescription: Choose your branch, sign in with your account, and manage the daily flow from one mobile center.
auth.selectBranchWarning: Please select a branch before signing in.
auth.branchListFailed: Branch list could not be retrieved
auth.supportDescription: Reach the operations team quickly for ERP connectivity and sign-in support.
auth.sessionPolicyDescription: If the token is still valid, the session stays active so the team can keep working.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your corporate email address and we will send the password reset link by email.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Set your new password and return to your account securely.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated successfully.
resetPassword.invalidToken: The password reset link is invalid or missing.

welcome.headline: Manage today’s warehouse flow with confidence
welcome.subheadline: Goods receipt, transfer, shipment and stock movements in one mobile hub.
welcome.inventoryCard: Check shelf occupancy and stock density instantly.
welcome.opsCard: Track transfer, receipt and outbound flows in one place.
welcome.profileCard: Reach user, branch and session details.

operations.title: Operations hub
operations.subtitle: Make receipt, transfer, and outbound flows quickly accessible for field teams.
operations.pagedText: Manage {{count}} operation records in one list with search, filters, and infinite scroll.
operations.primaryCardText: The mobile team starts flows here, tracks progress, and spots bottlenecks early.
operations.task1Text: Sort and prioritize branch-based receipt requests.
operations.task3Text: Validate ready deliveries before final approval.

inventory.title: Inventory visibility
inventory.subtitle: See critical shelves, density, and stock alerts in one focused mobile screen.
inventory.heroText: Highlight busy zones, critical products, and action areas for the floor team on mobile.
inventory.loadingDescription: Product and warehouse summaries are loading with the current language preserved.
inventory.errorTitle: Inventory summary could not be loaded
inventory.loadFailed: Inventory visibility data could not be loaded.

transfer.title: Transfer Operations
transfer.subtitle: Manage inter-warehouse transfer flows from one module.
transfer.pendingText: Browse {{count}} pending transfer orders with search, filters, and infinite scroll.
transfer.emptyDescription: There are no assigned, incomplete transfer orders right now.
transfer.loadFailed: Transfer list could not be loaded.

profile.title: Profile and session
profile.subtitle: Manage user, branch, and session details securely from this screen.

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiUrlDescription: Test, save, or reset the service address used by the mobile app.
settings.apiUrlSaveError: API address could not be saved.

updates.forceDescription: You need to update the app to keep using this version.
updates.downloadingDescription: The new APK is being downloaded inside the app. Completion: %{{percent}}
updates.upToDate: This device is already on the latest version.
updates.notesSubtitle: Read what changed in the latest published version from this screen.
updates.loadingDescription: Preparing the latest APK info and release notes.
updates.errorTitle: Release notes could not be loaded
updates.errorDescription: The latest version info is not available right now.

workflow.hubDescription: We grouped the create, assigned, and full list flows from the WMS web sidebar into a faster, field-friendly mobile structure.
workflow.assignedRequestHint: Assigned is filtered by current user
workflow.listRequestHint: List is the general paged record flow
workflow.detailText: This screen only shows the record and its child lines. No operation is performed here.
workflow.detailLinesEmpty: No child lines were found for this record.
workflow.detailOrderLinesEmpty: No order lines found for this document.
workflow.detailCollectedLinesEmpty: No collected products found for this document.
workflow.detailLineSerialsEmpty: No serial details found for this order line.
workflow.detailRoutesEmpty: No route details found for this collected product.
workflow.detailPeopleText: Created-by and assigned users are shown here in read-only mode.
workflow.detailAssignedUsersEmpty: No assigned users found for this record.
workflow.listHeroText: Manage {{count}} records with search, advanced filters, and infinite scroll.
workflow.listEmptyDescription: Reset the search or filters and reload the {{title}} list.
workflow.listCardDescription: Browse {{title}} records with search, advanced filters, and paged loading.

create.stepOne: Verify the branch and operation type.
create.stepTwo: Prepare the document flow and align it with the field process.
create.stepThree: Continue from assigned orders when needed and move into collection or receipt steps.

goodsReceipt.title: Goods Receipt
goodsReceipt.subtitle: Goods Receipt create and assigned flows
goodsReceipt.createDescription: Start the receipt preparation and plan the mobile-first intake flow.
goodsReceipt.processDescription: Start a goods receipt operation without an order by selecting stocks.

goodsReceiptMobile.title: Create goods receipt
goodsReceiptMobile.subtitle: The web create flow is now available on mobile step by step. First enter the base document data, then build the receipt lines from orders or stock.
goodsReceiptMobile.invoiceDescription: Enable this if the receipt is tied to an invoice process.
goodsReceiptMobile.noOrderSelectedText: Choose one order from the list to load its receipt lines in this step.

goodsReceiptMobile.completeLineRequired: Each selected line must have quantity and target warehouse filled in.
goodsReceiptMobile.createSuccessMessage: The record was opened successfully. Redirecting to the goods receipt list.

validation.documentNoLength: Document number must be exactly 15 digits.
validation.documentNoInvoiceLength: For e-invoice, document number must be exactly 16 digits.
